modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Printer only prints from Tray 1, requires confirmation to proceed.

full_description_text:
- The printer is only able to print from Tray 1, which is causing delays.  
- Each time a print job is sent, the technician has to press OK on the printer to continue.  
- This issue is affecting the workflow and needs to be addressed promptly.
short_description: Printer only prints from Tray 1, requires confirmation to proceed.
description:
